chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الْمَاءِ وَ مَنْعِ فُضُولِ الْمَاءِ مِنَ الْأَوْدِيَةِ وَ السُّيُولِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 135 – Selling the water and prevention of wasting the water from the valleys and the streams

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/368)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/368)
text: قَضَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي سَيْلِ وَادِي مَهْزُورٍ لِلنَّخْلِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ وَ لِأَهْلِ الزَّرْعِ إِلَى الشِّرَاكَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Ali Bin Shajara, from Hafs Bin Giyas,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> judged regarding a waterway of the valley of Mahzour, for the palm trees it can be up to the two ankles, and for the farmers up to the two shoe-straps’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Asbat from Ali ibn Shajarah Hafs ibn Ghiyath who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, issued a judgment about the flood water of valley of Mahzur for palm trees up to the anklebones and for plantation up to shoelaces.”
